provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, small poison vial, squat round-bottomed glass bottle containing viscous sickly yellow-green liquid, a tiny skull embossed on the glass surface, dark wax seal over a wooden cork, the liquid looks thick and oily with a menacing shimmer, the glass is slightly clouded from the corrosive contents
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Single squat bottle, yellow-green liquid, skull emboss, wooden cork, dark bg. Good material read, menacing feel. Clean icon.
